page.title: Integration API Keys
page.description: Manage secret keys to access your datasets securely from external applications or SDKs.

external_provider.title: External Model Provider Configuration (Presentation Mode)
external_provider.description: Connect your own OpenAI API key to run models and send commands within the synthetic data studio.
external_provider.privacy_notice: Privacy Guarantee: Your key is strictly never saved to the remote database (backend). It is stored only in this browser's local storage and routed directly to the AI engine.
external_provider.success_message: Key verified successfully and connected to the browser session. Synthetic Data Studio is active!

generate.title: Create New Token
generate.description: Give your key a descriptive name to remember where it is used.
generate.name_placeholder: e.g., Python SDK Production, Jenkins CI

security_warning.title: Security Warning:
security_warning.message: Do not share your API keys in public repositories or client-side code. Anyone with this key can modify your dataset configurations.

key_list.title: Active API Keys
key_list.description: Tokens currently authorized to make requests under this account.

messages.create_failed: An error occurred while generating the key.
messages.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This action cannot be undone.
messages.revoked_success: API key has been permanently revoked.
messages.revoke_failed: An API error occurred while revoking the key.
messages.invalid_key: Please enter a valid key starting with 'sk-' and at least 10 characters long.
messages.external_success_toast: External API key securely connected to your browser session!
messages.key_cleared: External key cleared from browser storage.

settings_page.title: API Settings
settings_page.label: OpenAI / Service API Key
settings_page.success_message: Key verified and saved to browser storage!
settings_page.error_message: Invalid key, please check (must start with sk-).

create_modal.title: Create New API Key
create_modal.description: Give your key a name to identify it later.
create_modal.security_alert: For security reasons, we will not show this key again. Please copy it now.
